title: Reviewer turns a weak answer into a correction example
steps: Pick a weak answer missing evidence or object context.
Queue a correction example and add reviewer evidence.
expected: AssistantReviewExample stores the correction note and export JSON.
AssistantEvidenceRecord stores an inspectable evidence row linked to the audit event.
The weak-answer queue updates after refresh without changing business object data.

title: Reviewer approves a prompt starter
steps: Use the Prompt library card on /assistant/evidence-quality.
Create an approved prompt starter for operations.
expected: AssistantPromptLibraryItem persists title, prompt, domain, role scope, status, and usage metadata.
Approved prompts are runnable through /assistant with the prompt prefilled.
Release gate prompt-library check can pass once enough prompts are approved.

title: Quality release gate blocks unsafe assistant rollout
steps: Review evidence coverage, feedback coverage, weak-answer backlog, and prompt-library checks.
Evaluate and save the release gate.
Resolve failed checks by adding evidence/reviews/prompts, then re-evaluate.
expected: AssistantReleaseGate stores score, threshold, status, checks JSON, evaluator, and timestamp.
Gate remains BLOCKED when evidence or review quality is below threshold.
Gate can pass only when checks satisfy AMP7 quality thresholds.
